seeds.label: Village to Union Square
seeds.description: Audit ramp and topology evidence; unresolved segments are not claimed step-free.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square and run an accessibility evidence audit.

seeds.label: East Village audit
seeds.description: Inspect accessibility evidence from Tompkins Square Park.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Tompkins Square Park to Union Square and run an accessibility audit.

seeds.label: Brooklyn evidence audit
seeds.description: Audit known ramps and unresolved topology between Brooklyn parks.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Cooper Park to McCarren Park and run an accessibility evidence audit.

seeds.label: Union Square return audit
seeds.description: Inspect the reverse route without implying accessibility compliance.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Union Square to Washington Square Park and run an accessibility audit.
